title: Six Eyes Crafting Recipe
description: Datapack for Orca's Jujutsucraft that adds a crafting recipe for six eyes.
body:
Adds a recipe for Six Eyes in Orca's Jujutuscraft mod. By using 9 of any mastery (except six eyes) you can craft six eyes.

Requires Jujutsucraft (obviously)

#### v1
Allows you to craft six eyes with any 9 masteries (in base jjc).

#### v2
Same features as v1 but allows you to craft the other masteries using 6 eyes and a corresponding dye.

#### v3
Same features as v2 but lets you craft domain expansion with domain amplification and vice versa. Also craft simple domain with falling blossom emotion and vice versa.
